summary: FQ-19 blueprint art-consumer and contextual information pass, resumed after the 2026-07-14 machine restart. Re-verified the orphaned tranche (311/311 after one cold-start music flake), then completed the pass against the four reference images: deterministic final HUD art (ornate 9-slice dock backplate reused as the framed-module style, gem-crowned orb frames, fill mask, slot frames, glyph buttons; ten UI ids now consumed with fallbacks intact), blueprint dock order with key-numbered raised-selection slots, masked liquid resource vessels with damage/recovery/low-health/regeneration/use-pulse/full-core effects, framed crest and goal treatments, the exact settlement clock (Day N - Phase HH:MM), the event-driven contextual right-band stack (selected item, save toast, interaction prompt), and canvas_items stretch so 640x360 and 1280x720 render the identical accepted composition. Suite 316/316; strict audit clean; pixel verifier 186 PASS; validator and capsule doctor pass; both-resolution screenshot tours visually inspected. Mini-map final art, unconsumed reserved UI ids, and durability/cooldown strips explicitly deferred. Signable but uncommitted; the worktree stacks this on the also-uncommitted 2026-07-14 art run and FQ-16..18 arc for one operator commit decision.
scope: FQ-19 HUD blueprint pass only: hud.gd, game_root.gd, smoke_test.gd, asset_audit.py, gen_ui_placeholders.py, new gen_hud_final_art.py, final ui PNGs, project.godot stretch, docs. No mini-map art, no new mechanics.
next_action: Operator reviews the rendered captures and the background review-agent report, then decides the commit strategy for the three stacked uncommitted layers (art run + FQ-16..18 + FQ-19).
